- 4.3.5.2.2 LockOnReset Restrictions The TPer SHALL support the following LockOnReset column values:
- 4.3.5.3 MBRControl (M) The MBRControl table is defined in [2], and Table 46 defines the Preconfiguration Data for the MBRControl table.
title: LockOnReset Restrictions

source: *MC1 means that only a limited set of DoneOnReset values is required to be supported by Opal SSC compliant Storage Devices. Refer to section 4.3.5.3.1 for details.
